003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,

015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.saml;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
022
023import java.io.*;
024import java.nio.charset.*;
025import java.security.*;
026import java.util.*;
027import java.util.zip.*;
028
029import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.*;
030
031import jakarta.servlet.http.*;
032
033/**
034 * {@link AuthFilter} that authenticates requests carrying a SAML 2.0 {@code <samlp:Response>} delivered via
035 * the {@link SamlBinding#POST} or {@link SamlBinding#REDIRECT} HTTP binding.
036 *
037 * <p>
038 * On each request this filter:
039 * <ol>
040 *    <li>Inspects the URL path against the configured {@code consumerPath} (default {@code /saml/acs}).  If the
041 *       request path does not match, returns {@link Optional#empty()} (filter does not apply).
042 *    <li>For the {@link SamlBinding#POST} binding: reads the {@code SAMLResponse} form parameter and
043 *       base64-decodes it.  For {@link SamlBinding#REDIRECT}: reads the {@code SAMLResponse} query parameter,
044 *       base64-decodes it, and then DEFLATE-inflates (RFC 1951) per OASIS SAML 2.0 Redirect binding rules.
045 *    <li>Delegates to {@link SamlAssertionValidator#validate(String)}.  On success, builds an {@link AuthResult}
046 *       carrying the resolved {@link ClaimsPrincipal}.  On failure, re-throws as an
047 *       {@link AuthenticationException} with a {@code WWW-Authenticate: SAML ...} challenge.
048 * </ol>
049 *
050 * <h5 class='topic'>Roles</h5>
051 * <p>
052 * If the resolved {@link ClaimsPrincipal} contains a claim whose name equals the configured
053 * {@code rolesClaim} (default {@code "roles"}) and whose value is a {@link List} of {@link String}, those role
054 * names are populated on the {@link AuthResult}.  Otherwise the role set is empty.
055 *
056 * <h5 class='topic'>Usage</h5>
057 *
058 * <p class='bjava'>
059 *    <jk>var</jk> validator = SamlAssertionValidator.<jsm>create</jsm>()
060 *       .metadataResolver(SamlMetadataResolvers.<jsm>url</jsm>(<js>"https://idp.example.com/metadata"</js>))
061 *       .spEntityId(<js>"https://sp.example.com"</js>)
062 *       .expectedIssuer(<js>"https://idp.example.com"</js>)
063 *       .build();
064 *
065 *    AuthFilterChain.<jsm>create</jsm>(<jv>bs</jv>)
066 *       .append(SamlAuthFilter.<jsm>create</jsm>()
067 *          .consumerPath(<js>"/saml/acs"</js>)
068 *          .binding(SamlBinding.<jsf>POST</jsf>)
069 *          .validator(<jv>validator</jv>)
070 *          .build())
071 *       .build();
072 * </p>
073 *
074 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5>
075 * <ul>
076 *    <li class='jc'>{@link SamlAssertionValidator}
077 *    <li class='jc'>{@link SamlBinding}
078 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://docs.oasis-open.org/security/saml/v2.0/saml-bindings-2.0-os.pdf">SAML 2.0 Bindings (OASIS)</a>
079 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/AuthFilterFramework">AuthN Filter Framework</a>
080 * </ul>
081 *
082 * @since 10.0.0
083 */
084@SuppressWarnings({
085   "java:S1192" // Duplicate string literals are SAML attribute names and HTTP header values; intentional
086})
087public class SamlAuthFilter extends AuthFilter {
088
089   private static final String DEFAULT_CONSUMER_PATH = "/saml/acs";
090   private static final String DEFAULT_ROLES_CLAIM = "roles";
091   private static final String SAML_RESPONSE_PARAM = "SAMLResponse";
092
093   /**
094    * Static creator.
095    *
096    * @return A new builder.
097    */
098   public static Builder create() {
099      return new Builder();
100   }
101
102   /**
103    * Builder for {@link SamlAuthFilter}.
104    */
105   public static class Builder {
106      private SamlAssertionValidator validator;
107      private SamlBinding binding = SamlBinding.POST;
108      private String consumerPath = DEFAULT_CONSUMER_PATH;
109      private String rolesClaim = DEFAULT_ROLES_CLAIM;
110      private String realm = "saml";
111
112      /** Constructor. */
113      protected Builder() {}
114
115      /**
116       * Sets the SAML assertion validator.
117       *
118       * @param value The validator.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
119       * @return This object.
120       */
121      public Builder validator(SamlAssertionValidator value) {
122         validator = assertArgNotNull("value", value);
123         return this;
124      }
125
126      /**
127       * Sets the SAML binding the filter listens for.  Defaults to {@link SamlBinding#POST}.
128       *
129       * @param value The binding.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
130       * @return This object.
131       */
132      public Builder binding(SamlBinding value) {
133         binding = assertArgNotNull("value", value);
134         return this;
135      }
136
137      /**
138       * Sets the request path that carries the SAML assertion.  Defaults to {@code /saml/acs}.
139       *
140       * @param value The request path.  Must not be <jk>null</jk> or blank.
141       * @return This object.
142       */
143      public Builder consumerPath(String value) {
144         consumerPath = assertArgNotNullOrBlank("value", value);
145         return this;
146      }
147
148      /**
149       * Sets the claim name used to extract roles from the resolved {@link ClaimsPrincipal}.
150       *
151       * @param value The claim name.  Must not be <jk>null</jk> or blank.
152       * @return This object.
153       */
154      public Builder rolesClaim(String value) {
155         rolesClaim = assertArgNotNullOrBlank("value", value);
156         return this;
157      }
158
159      /**
160       * Sets the {@code WWW-Authenticate: SAML realm="<value>"} challenge realm.
161       *
162       * @param value The realm.  Must not be <jk>null</jk> or blank.
163       * @return This object.
164       */
165      public Builder realm(String value) {
166         realm = assertArgNotNullOrBlank("value", value);
167         return this;
168      }
169
170      /**
171       * Builds the filter.
172       *
173       * @return A new {@link SamlAuthFilter}.
174       */
175      public SamlAuthFilter build() {
176         if (validator == null)
177            throw new IllegalStateException("SamlAuthFilter requires a SamlAssertionValidator");
178         return new SamlAuthFilter(this);
179      }
180   }
181
182   private final SamlAssertionValidator validator;
183   private final SamlBinding binding;
184   private final String consumerPath;
185   private final String rolesClaim;
186   private final String challenge;
187
188   /**
189    * Constructor.
190    *
191    * @param b The builder to read configuration from.
192    */
193   protected SamlAuthFilter(Builder b) {
194      this.validator = b.validator;
195      this.binding = b.binding;
196      this.consumerPath = b.consumerPath;
197      this.rolesClaim = b.rolesClaim;
198      this.challenge = "SAML realm=\"" + b.realm + "\"";
199   }
200
201   @Override /* Overridden from AuthFilter */
202   public Optional<AuthResult> authenticate(HttpServletRequest req) throws AuthenticationException {
203      if (!matchesPath(req))
204         return oe();
205      var raw = req.getParameter(SAML_RESPONSE_PARAM);
206      if (isEmpty(raw))
207         return oe();
208      var xml = decodeSamlResponse(raw);
209      var principal = runValidator(xml);
210      return o(AuthResult.of(principal, extractRoles(principal)));
211   }
212
213   private boolean matchesPath(HttpServletRequest req) {
214      var p = req.getPathInfo();
215      var s = p != null ? p : req.getServletPath();
216      return s != null && s.equals(consumerPath);
217   }
218
219   private String decodeSamlResponse(String raw) throws AuthenticationException {
220      try {
221         byte[] decoded = Base64.getMimeDecoder().decode(raw);
222         if (binding == SamlBinding.REDIRECT) {
223            // Per SAML 2.0 Redirect binding: deflate using raw DEFLATE (no zlib wrapper).
224            return inflate(decoded);
225         }
226         return new String(decoded, StandardCharsets.UTF_8);
227      } catch (IllegalArgumentException e) {
228         throw new AuthenticationException(e, "SAMLResponse parameter is not valid base64")
229            .wwwAuthenticate(challenge);
230      } catch (IOException e) {
231         throw new AuthenticationException(e, "SAMLResponse parameter could not be inflated (REDIRECT binding)")
232            .wwwAuthenticate(challenge);
233      }
234   }
235
236   private static String inflate(byte[] data) throws IOException {
237      var inflater = new Inflater(true);  // nowrap=true: raw DEFLATE per SAML Redirect.
238      inflater.setInput(data);
239      var out = new ByteArrayOutputStream();
240      var buf = new byte[4096];
241      try {
242         while (!inflater.finished()) {
243            int n = inflater.inflate(buf);
244            if (n == 0) { // HTT: n==0 without finished=true requires a crafted partial DEFLATE stream (all bytes consumed but stream not closed)
245               if (inflater.needsInput() || inflater.needsDictionary()) // HTT: requires carefully crafted incomplete DEFLATE that exhausts input without DataFormatException
246                  throw new IOException("SAMLResponse: DEFLATE stream truncated");
247               break;
248            }
249            out.write(buf, 0, n);
250         }
251      } catch (DataFormatException e) {
252         throw new IOException("SAMLResponse: malformed DEFLATE", e);
253      } finally {
254         inflater.end();
255      }
256      return out.toString(StandardCharsets.UTF_8);
257   }
258
259   private Principal runValidator(String xml) throws AuthenticationException {
260      try {
261         var p = validator.validate(xml);
262         if (p == null)
263            throw new AuthenticationException("SAML validator returned null").wwwAuthenticate(challenge);
264         return p;
265      } catch (AuthenticationException e) {
266         var hasChallenge = e.getHeaders().stream()
267            .anyMatch(h -> "WWW-Authenticate".equalsIgnoreCase(h.getName()));
268         if (!hasChallenge)
269            e.wwwAuthenticate(challenge);
270         throw e;
271      } catch (RuntimeException e) {
272         throw new AuthenticationException(e, "SAML validation failed").wwwAuthenticate(challenge);
273      }
274   }
275
276   @SuppressWarnings({
277      "unchecked" // Type erasure on reflective/generic cast; element type is verified at call site
278   })
279   private Set<String> extractRoles(Principal principal) {
280      if (principal instanceof ClaimsPrincipal cp) {
281         var v = cp.getClaims().get(rolesClaim);
282         if (v instanceof List<?> list) {
283            var roles = new HashSet<String>();
284            for (var item : (List<Object>) list)
285               if (item instanceof String s)
286                  roles.add(s);
287            return roles;
288         }
289      }
290      return Collections.emptySet();
291   }
292}
